name: Memory Aegis v3
description: Cognitive memory engine with graph activation, no embedding required

retrievalMaxHops.description: Maximum graph traversal depth for spreading activation

decayHalfLifeDays.description: Half-life for temporal decay of volatile memories

crystallizationThreshold.description: Minimum spaced recalls before crystallization eligible

embeddingAccelerator.description: Enable optional embedding-based vector search alongside FTS5

maintenanceCron.description: Cron schedule for background maintenance (decay, pruning, promotion)

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Search Aegis memory for relevant context.

tools.name: memory_get
tools.description: Read a specific Aegis memory citation or file fragment.

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Persist user-provided text into Aegis memory.

tools.name: memory_backup_upload
tools.description: Upload a local Aegis memory snapshot backup to a remote cloud storage location (like Google Drive). This preserves memory safely off-device.

localBackupPath.description: Absolute path to the local .db.bak or .jsonl file generated by memory_backup tool.

cloudDestinationPath.description: Logical directory or folder ID on the remote cloud where the file should be saved.

tools.name: memory_backup_download
tools.description: Download a remote memory snapshot backup from a cloud storage location into a local temporary file for restoration.

cloudSourcePath.description: Logical directory, folder ID, or file link representing the exact backup to download.

localDestinationDir.description: Directory path where the downloaded backup should be placed on the local machine.

tools.name: memory_stats
tools.description: View detailed Aegis memory telemetry and growth stats (Honeybee dance).
